subcodes.first_line: God, exalted be His glory, hath created His servants for His recognition. Blessed is the soul that turneth unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حق جل جلاله عباد را از برای عرفان خلق فرموده طوبی از برای نفسیکه باو توجه
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @goodly deeds; actions, @purpose; goal of creation, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
